# EntityNotLoadedException class

The exception that is thrown when an actor passes a command to [`Append`](../EntityDb.Common.Transactions/TransactionBuilder-1/Append.md) with an entity id which has not been loaded.

```csharp
public sealed class EntityNotLoadedException : Exception
```
